title: paspalum tenue
intro: Paspalum tenue, also known as slender paspalum or fine paspalum, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum tenue include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
